headline: Agent memory and persistence moved to the center of coding-agent design this month, alongside a leading cluster in tool calling, embeddings, and vector databases.
body: The dominant theme is agent continuity: talks framed durable session logs, not models or frameworks, as the persistent identity of an agent, and argued that current coding agents fail for lack of context and memory of prior runs. Tool calling, embeddings, and vector databases lead the retrieval stack, reflected in Google Cloud's AI-native databases, hybrid full-text and vector search in Spanner, and Model Context Protocol integrations. Production evaluation shifted toward continuous pipelines measuring tool use, planning, and drift rather than static benchmarks. Optimal transport broke out among new technique entrants including feed-forward network, emergent behavior, and optical flow.

cited_items.title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
The Log Is The Agent - Ishaan Sehgal, Omnara
Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
